creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Because of unrelated props-changed (mergeinfo) history of many/most files is nearly useless or at least inconvenient to use.

Fix: 

Skip such revisions on history page and maybe provide option to reveal them.
How-To-Repeat: See for example:
http://svn.freebsd.org/viewvc/base/stable/8/sys/netinet/ipfw/ip_fw2.c?view=log
rev 196320 and lower
